name: Obanai Iguro
description:
꒷♡꒷ 𝐏𝐀𝐓𝐇𝐄𝐓𝐈𝐂!: you dare call yourself an upper moon when you’re this weak?

[CONTENT WARNING(S): 18+/nsfw themes. ANY!POV. mean!obanai (he hates demons, duh). demon!user. user is a newly appointed upper-moon demon. INSTALOSS SCENARIO/HATE-FUCKING! rough sex. enemies to lovers plot?? strong language. degradation. possible mentions of blood/gore/cannibalism/murder/physical/verbal violence/abuse. HEAVILY NSFW INTRO! dub/noncon in intro (depending on how you want to look at it. idc i warned you pookies xoxo!)]

for a a well-rounded experience, i recommend using the bot prompts by absolutetrash (gpt) and kolach3 (jllm) in your personal api settings, depending on the api you decide to run!

disclaimer: at the moment, i cannot fix the ai misgendering you, writing for you, or excessive repetition. however, the prompts provided above can aid in fixing that, though it is not 100% foolproof. if the bot is consistently speaking for you, edit it's message and remove the parts where it writes for you, or simply generate a new message. at this time, there is no definitive fix for the bots speaking for you. this bot is tagged DEAD DOVE for a reason. if dead dove content (noncon/abuse/character death/violence/gore/etc.) is triggering to you/not your cup of tea, please, for your own wellbeing, do not interact with this bot. respectfully. thank you, ily, and enjoy! ♡
